title: Physical Therapist Aides
description: Under close supervision of a physical therapist or physical therapy assistant, perform only delegated, selected, or routine tasks in specific situations. These duties include preparing the patient and the treatment area.

tasks.text: Clean and organize work area and disinfect equipment after treatment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Secure patients into or onto therapy equipment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct, motivate, safeguard, or assist patients practicing exercises or functional activities, under direction of medical staff.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with physical therapy staff or others to discuss and evaluate patient information for planning, modifying, or coordinating treatment.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Observe patients during treatment to compile and evaluate data on patients' responses and progress and report to physical therapist.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Change linens, such as bed sheets and pillow cases.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Administer active or passive manual therapeutic exercises, therapeutic massage, or heat, light, sound, water, or electrical modality treatments, such as ultrasound.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Transport patients to and from treatment areas, using wheelchairs or providing standing support.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform clerical duties, such as taking inventory, ordering supplies, answering telephone, taking messages, or filling out forms.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Schedule patient appointments with physical therapists and coordinate therapists' schedules.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Arrange treatment supplies to keep them in order.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist patients to dress, undress, or put on and remove supportive devices, such as braces, splints, or slings.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Maintain equipment or furniture to keep it in good working condition, including performing the assembly or disassembly of equipment or accessories.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Record treatment given and equipment used.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Measure patient's range-of-joint motion, body parts, or vital signs to determine effects of treatments or for patient evaluations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train patients to use orthopedic braces, prostheses, or supportive devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Administer traction to relieve neck or back pain, using intermittent or static traction equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Fit patients for orthopedic braces, prostheses, or supportive devices, adjusting fit as needed.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Participate in patient care tasks, such as assisting with passing food trays, feeding residents, or bathing residents on bed rest.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
